description_long: This is a standard manual screwdriver featuring a cylindrical, slightly contoured handle made of green plastic. The handle shows some visible wear, with areas of discoloration and scuffing, suggesting frequent use. The shaft is metallic and straight, extending from the center of the handle and terminating in a flathead tip. The metal shaft appears robust and is securely embedded into the handle. No brand markings or logos are visible on the handle or shaft. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on function over aesthetics.
description: A well-used green-handled flathead screwdriver with a metallic shaft and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: The screwdriver is seen from the tip, showing the circular end of the handle and the straight alignment of the shaft.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the screwdriver, highlighting the green handle and the straight metal shaft with a flathead tip.
description_view_2: Viewed from the handle end, the circular base and the narrow shaft extending away are visible.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the handle and shaft.
attribute_handle_type: straight, slightly contoured, green plastic, visibly worn, ergonomic for grip
attribute_visible_wear_or_damage: visible wear, discoloration, and scuffing on the handle
